reviews.review_description:
I wish I could post pictures of the actual game play! It doesn’t look anything like the pictures! Microsoft flight simulator 95 looked better… 
It’s not even a paraglider! It’s garbage!!! 

AGAIN… DO NOT BUY! 

Why this is allowed to be on here to scam people is beyond me! Worst purchase to date!

reviews.review_title: THE GAME IS NOT WHA IT SHOWS
reviews.review_description: Don’t buy it it’s sooo bad I cant get any angrier

Why do developers keep trying to sell half-baked games. The quest is full ofwonderfully fantastic games and some games like this is not ready, not even as a free or demo games........and it should not matter how many times you ask for refunds. we should not be made to be stuck with unfinished half-baked games. its not our fault that the game is not ready.
Its always sooo easy to collect funds from accounts when purchasing but can be so hard to get refunds. the games has no tutorial, no movements, just a static picture.......so not fair to beselling games like this. even if its free, its stilla no good flight sim....yet. i think all games should have a demo 1st.
Am sick and tired of getting stuck with unplayable games as i have more than 10 of them in my games library. Only played this game for less than 10 mins, seriously no good and i really want a full refund🙁

developer_response.body:
Hi,
We’re really sorry you had such a frustrating experience. You're absolutely right — no one should feel stuck with a game that feels unfinished. We're still actively developing this project and your feedback highlights areas we need to fix fast, especially tutorials and movement.

We understand your concerns about refunds and fairness — thank you for being honest. We’ll work hard to earn back your trust.

— Paragliding Game Team
